body:value: The major objectives of the RMSA are to (i) raise the minimum level of education to class X and universalize access to secondary education; (ii) ensure good quality secondary education with focus on Science, Mathematics, and English; and (iii) reduce the gender, social, and regional gaps in enrolments, dropouts, and improving retention. Despite being launched in the third year of Plan, there was a good progress under RMSA during the Eleventh Plan in strengthening Secondary School infrastructure, provision of additional teachers and in service training of teachers. It also undertook repair works in existing schools in a massive way.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Education
field_ministry_department:name: NITI Aayog
field_sector:name: Education
Elementary
title: Rashtriya Madhyamik Shiksha Abhiyan ( RMSA), Achievement In The Eleventh Plan

body:value: The data refers to growth rate of Gross Domestic Product (GDP) at Factor Cost (at 2004-05 prices) for different sectors of the economy from 2007-08 to 2011-12 for 12th Five-Year Plan (2012-17). The data has been sourced from Central Statistical Organisation (CSO).
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Industries
field_ministry_department:name: NITI Aayog
field_sector:name: Industries
title: Rate of Growth of GDP at Factor Cost (Per cent)

body:value: The data refers to details on receipts from other related transactions undertaken. It includes capital receipts, special dividends and dividend tax in CPSEs, slump sale, sale of shares to employees in privatised CPSEs, control premium given by Suzuki Motors Co. (SMC) to GoI for renunciation of rights shares in favour of SMC and leasing of hotel of ITDC.

title: Receipts From Other Related Transactions Undertaken
